dialog.bte.druid_quest_pres.2: A Hero? I never met a hero before, but I guess you're the one I have to guide.
dialog.bte.druid_quest_pres.3: My name is Oriana, I am in charge of the balance and natural order, as well as the creatures that inhabit the universe.
dialog.bte.druid_quest_pres.4: Speak to me again, and I will reveal more about these creatures.
dialog.bte.druid_quest_task.1: Oh, I didn't see you. Need anything?
dialog.bte.explorer_quest_pres.1:
Well, well. What do we have here?
The only thing I couldn't track:
The Legendary Hero.
dialog.bte.explorer_quest_pres.2: I don't know if you've introduced yourself to the others, but... I'm Antonio, and I'm dedicated to exploration.
dialog.bte.explorer_quest_pres.3:
I've traveled through every dimension,
and I know every corner of each one.
dialog.bte.explorer_quest_pres.4: Don't hesitate to ask me if you get lost on your journey, Hero.
dialog.bte.explorer_quest_task.1: Ey... Where do we go this time?
dialog.bte.npc5_quest_pres.1: Before you go, let me explain something important...
dialog.bte.npc5_quest_pres.2:
In this hall you will find Three Portals
To The Overworld on the left which is already unlocked.
dialog.bte.npc5_quest_pres.3:
To The Nether on the right which is unlocked after collect 8 different
Ender Eyes.
dialog.bte.npc5_quest_pres.4: Finally behind me you will find The End portal, which will be unlocked after collect 16 different Ender Eyes.
dialog.bte.warlock_quest_pres.1: Huh? Who's there? Oh, it's you—finally. You'be been taking your time, haven't you?
dialog.bte.warlock_quest_pres.2: I'm Noah, sorcerer and alchemist, at your service.
dialog.bte.warlock_quest_pres.3: As you know, a new enemy threatens this reality, and you’ll need my help.
dialog.bte.warlock_quest_pres.4: Bring me tomes of enchantment and the necessary materials, and I’ll enchant your equipment and prepare concoctions.
dialog.bte.blacksmith_quest_pres.1: I cannot believe it! Y-you are here! The great Hero!
dialog.bte.blacksmith_quest_pres.2: I'm Anna! And this is my forge. Here i will craft to you the best equipment you can ever imagine.
dialog.bte.blacksmith_quest_pres.3: And if you need to repair or upgrade something just bring it to me along with the materials.
dialog.bte.blacksmith_quest_pres.4: Have a great adventure and the best of luck, Hero. See you soon!
dialog.bte.blacksmith_quest_task.1: You are back! What can I do for you this time?
rumor.bte.ancient_city.title: Ancient City
rumor.bte.ancient_city.desc:
The Ancient City is a forgotten ruin hidden deep within the Deep Dark Biome that can be found in the lower layers of the Overworld.

There lurks a creature known as The Warden.

You will need to defeat it to obtain the Sculk Eye.
rumor.bte.ancient_factory.title: Ancient Factory
rumor.bte.ancient_factory.desc:
The Ancient Factory can be found in the underground of the Overworld. Before going to this place, you should get a Nether Star, defeating The Wither.

You will reach a room with what appears to be some kind of robot, you need to insert the Nether Star to turn it on.

Finally you need to defeat it to obtain the Mech Eye.
rumor.bte.bastion_remnant.title: Bastion Remnant
rumor.bte.bastion_remnant.desc:
The Bastion Remnant can be found around the Nether.

Inside these structures you can find Treasure Chests.

You will have to search through all of them until you find the Cursed Eye.
rumor.bte.black_smith.title: Soul Blacksmith
rumor.bte.black_smith.desc:
The Soul Blacksmith is an old blacksmith that can be found around the Nether.

There is a kind of golem known as the Netherite Monstrosity.

You will need to defeat it to obtain the Monstrous Eye.
rumor.bte.burning_arena.title: Burning Arena
rumor.bte.burning_arena.desc:
The Burning Arena is an ancient coliseum that can be found over the Nether.

There are guardians known as Ignited Berserker that may drop Dying Ember on death.

Once you have four of them you will be able to create the Burning Ashes.

You must place this item on the Altar of Fire to summon The Ingis.

Finally you will need to defeat it to obtain the Flame Eye.
rumor.bte.catacomb.title: Catacomb
rumor.bte.catacomb.desc:
The Catacomb can be found around the Nether.

First of all you will need a pickaxe with a hardness of Netherite to be able to access inside.

Deep within this structure you can obtain Soul Stone, you will need at least four of these blocks to be able to summon The Wither.
rumor.bte.colliseum.title: The Colliseum
rumor.bte.colliseum.desc:
The Colliseum is a structure that you can find over the Overworld.

There you will be able to place a Fossil Bait, Haunted Bell, Devil's Ante or Dusk Key to summon ancient creatures who will not hesitate to fight you.
rumor.bte.compass.title: Find Structures
rumor.bte.compass.desc:
In this adventure you will have to travel to specific structures to get the Ender Eyes.

To do this, I can craft you different Compasses that will guide you on your adventure, just bring me the necessary materials.
rumor.bte.cursed_pyramid.title: Cursed Pyramid
rumor.bte.cursed_pyramid.desc:
The Cursed Pyramid can be found in the Desert biome around the Overworld.

There you will need to use a Brush in the Suspicious Sand until you obtain a Necklace of the Desert.

Finally equip this necklace to a dinosaur skeleton to awaken it.

You will need to defeat this creature to obtain the Desert Eye.
rumor.bte.frosted_prison.title: Frosted Prison
rumor.bte.frosted_prison.desc:
The Frosted Prison can be found in the Snowy Biomes around the Overworld.

In the deeps of this structure you will see a sealed room with a Cursed Tombstone inside that will summon The Maledictus.

You will need to defeat this creature to obtain the Frost Eye.
rumor.bte.mutant_mobs.title: Mutate Mobs
rumor.bte.mutant_mobs.desc:
Some mobs can be mutated into powerful creatures.

First Oriana will have to create a Formula Y or Compound Z to you.

After that you will have to throw this potion towards a mutable mob.

The Wither Skeleton, Blaze, Shulker, Husk, Hoglin and Zombie can be mutated with this method.
rumor.bte.natures_compass.title: Natures Compass
rumor.bte.natures_compass.desc:
The Natures Compass will allow you to find Biomes more easily throughout your adventure.

Just right click while holding it and select the Biome you want to find.
rumor.bte.ocean_monument.title: Ocean Monument
rumor.bte.ocean_monument.desc:
The Ocean Monument can be found in the Oceans around the Overworld.

Inside of this structure you will find the Elder Guardian.

You will need to defeat this creature to obtain the Guardian Eye.
rumor.bte.paraglider.title: Paraglider
rumor.bte.paraglider.desc:
The Paraglider is a powerful tool that will allow you to move faster while gliding over long distances.

Additionally, if you jump on top of a lit Fire or Campfire while using the Paraglider, you'll ascend several blocks.
rumor.bte.ruined_citadel.title: Ruined Citadel
rumor.bte.ruined_citadel.desc:
The Ruined Citadel can be found in the End Islands.

There can be found multiple Ender Golems guarding this place.

Deep within it the Ender Guardian will be waiting for you.

You will need to defeat it to obtain the Void Eye.
rumor.bte.sunken_city.title: Sunken City
rumor.bte.sunken_city.desc:
The Sunken City can be found in the Oceans over the Overworld.

There you will find creatures that may drop important ingredients.

These are used to create the Abyssal Sacrifice.

You must defeat the Leviathan to obtain the Abyss Eye.
rumor.bte.the_wither.title: The Wither
rumor.bte.the_wither.desc:
The Wither is a boss that must be summoned using Soul Stone blocks and Wither Skeleton Skulls.

You will need to defeat it to obtain the Nether Star.
rumor.bte.twilight_forest.title: Twilight Forest
rumor.bte.twilight_forest.desc:
Twilight Forest is a new dimension composed of a dense forest and perpetual twilight.

To activate the portal you must throw a Diamond into the lake near Oriana.
page.bte.crimson_mosquito.title: Crimson Mosquito
page.bte.crimson_mosquito.desc:
Crimson Mosquito can be found in the Crimson Forest biome.

They may drop Crimson Mosquito Proboscis on death.

If they have absorbed the player's
blood, they may drop Blood Sac on death.
page.bte.crimson_mosquito_larva.title: Crimson M. Larva
page.bte.crimson_mosquito_larva.desc:
Crimson Mosquito Larva may be 
dropped by a Crimson Mosquito on
death.

They can be used to tamed Warped Toads or transform Stradpoles to Straddlers.
page.bte.enderiophage.title: Enderiophage
page.bte.enderiophage.desc:
The Enderiophage is a virus-like creature that can be found around the End dimension.

if you are not careful enough they will infect you with Ender Flu, a lethal issue that can only be cured eating a Chorus Fruit.

An Enderiophage may drop a Capsip on death.
page.bte.fly.title: Fly
page.bte.fly.desc:
Flies can be found over the Overworld.

They are able to damage Undead Creatures like Skeleton or Zombies.

Flies may drop a Maggot on death.

A Fly will be transform into a Crimson Mosquito if stay enough time in the 
Nether.
page.bte.horse.title: Horse
page.bte.horse.desc:
A tamed Horse can be set as a Personal Horse pressing the P key while you are riding it.

Then while you are in the Overworld you can call it pressing the º key.
page.bte.mauler.title: Mauler
page.bte.mauler.desc:
The Mauler can be found in a Raid.

They can be tamed by feeding them enough rotten flesh.

Once tamed they are allowed to being equipped with Mauler Armor of different tiers: Iron, Gold, Diamond, Illagium and Netherite.
page.bte.mungus.title: Mungus
page.bte.mungus.desc:
The Mungus can be found in the 
Mushroom Fields biome.

They will randomly shed Mungal Spores.

Mungus with Mushrooms on their head will fire beams at Mushrooms. If the Mushrooms are placed on Mycelium or Podzol, the beam turns them into large Mushrooms. Otherwise, the Mushrooms spread to adjacent blocks.
page.bte.mysterious_worm.title: Mysterious Worm
page.bte.mysterious_worm.desc:
The Mysterious Worm is a needed item to summon a powerful entity known as the Void Worm.

To create it you need to place a Capsip and then right click it while you are holding a Crimson Mosquito Larva on your hand.
page.bte.raker.title: Raker
page.bte.raker.desc:
The Raker can be found in a Raid.

They can be tamed by feeding them a pufferfish if their health is low enough.

Once tamed they are allowed to being equipped with Raker Armor and Raker Claws of different tiers: Iron, Gold, Diamond, Illagium and Netherite.
page.bte.scrounger.title: Scrounger
page.bte.scrounger.desc:
The Scrounger can be found in a Raid.

They can be tamed by feeding them enough spider eyes if no Beast Tamers are around.

Once tamed they are allowed to being equipped with a Scrounger Pouch to carry potions.
page.bte.straddler.title: Straddler
page.bte.straddler.desc:
Straddlers can be found in the Basalt Delta biome.

They may drop Basalt and Straddlite on death.

The Straddlite can be combined with Netherite to make a Straddleboard.
page.bte.void_worm.title: Void Worm
page.bte.void_worm.desc:
The Void Worm is a powerful entity that must be summoned throwing a Mysterious Worm into the End void.

You must defeat this creature to obtain the Parasite Eye.
page.bte.warped_mosco.title: Warped Mosco
page.bte.warped_mosco.desc:
The Warped Mosco is a strong creature that can be summoned if the right circumstances occur.

First a Mungus infected with exactly 5 Warped Mungus must be placed on the Nether. After that a Crimson Mosquito 
must bite the Mungus.

Once defeated the Warped Mosco may drop Warped Muscle and Hemolymph Sac on death.
page.bte.wild_ravager.title: Wild Ravager
page.bte.wild_ravager.desc:
The Wild Ravager can be found in a Raid.

They can be tamed when stunned with a shield by feeding them hay bales.

Once tamed they can be ridden and are allowed to being equipped with a Ravager Armor of different tiers: Iron, Gold, Diamond, Illagium and Netherite.
page.bte.wolf.title: Wolf
page.bte.wolf.desc:
A Wolf can be tamed feeding it with
Bones.

A tamed Wolf can be equipped with armor of different levels: Leather, Gold, Iron, Diamond and Netherite.
